body.title: Calving trigger — on write, calve if tree exceeds 1000 nodes
body.result: a71db938 — _maybe_calve in store(), gated by IGOR_CALVING_ENABLED + IGOR_CALVING_THRESHOLD (default 1000). Splits at parent of deepest node. Switch enabled in igor.switches.cfg. 4 tests.
body.description: After cortex.store() inserts a node, check the tree size. If >1000 nodes, find the deepest subtree (reuse find_calving_candidates logic) and call calve_subtree. Threshold configurable via IGOR_CALVING_THRESHOLD (default 1000). Gate behind IGOR_CALVING_ENABLED switch.
